summary: Project named Cleanio — a bike-related cleaning service app. Working on branding with a bike logo beside the Cleanio name and styled text ("Clean" in orange, "io" in white).

existing_features.title: In the Layout component header, update the 'Cleanio' wordmark text so that 'Clean' is rendered in orange and 'io' is rendered in white. Split the text into two separate spans: one for 'Clean' with the orange brand color and one for 'io' with white color.

new_feature_requests.summary: Display bike logo beside the Cleanio name in the header/branding
Style 'Clean' in orange and 'io' in white in the Cleanio logo text
